title: SmallFire
description: this ressource pack make the fire in the sceen more smaller
body:
# >  SmallFire – Minimal Flame Resource Pack

Tired of fire blocking your view while building or PvPing? SmallFire is a sleek, performance-friendly texture pack that reduces the size of fire animations—making flames smaller, cleaner, and less intrusive without sacrificing their visual impact.

# >  Features:
- Compact fire textures for both regular and soul fire
- Improved visibility in survival, PvP, and creative modes
- Perfect for low-end systems or players who prefer minimal visuals
- Compatible with most Minecraft versions and other texture packs

Whether you're exploring lava caves or battling in the Nether, SmallFire keeps your screen clear and your gameplay smooth.

### by _2onepunchman2_
